_readme: Template for deployments/admin-governance.mainnet.json (the real file is gitignored and
created only at mainnet cutover). Replace every <PLACEHOLDER>. Parameters below are
recommended production defaults, not mandates. Mainnet ledgers close ~5s, so
Cutover: deploy the governance contract, init it with these params, then call
transfer_admin(<governance_contract_id>) on each governed contract. See docs/GOVERNANCE.md
and docs/MAINNET_RUNBOOK.md. Do not transfer admin until the user approves in chat.
